post.summary: Send OTP to user (signup or forgot password)
post.description: Step 1: User enters mobile, receives OTP via SMS. Use this for both signup and forgot password.

post.summary: Verify OTP for user (signup or forgot password)
post.description: Step 2: User enters mobile and OTP. If OTP is valid, returns a temp_token (required for signup).

200.description: OTP verified successfully. Returns temp_token for next step.

post.summary: Signup with mobile, temp_token, name, password (after OTP verified)
post.description: Step 3: User enters mobile, temp_token (from verify-otp), name, password, and optional email. Completes signup and receives login token.

201.description: Signup successful. Returns user and login token.

post.summary: Login with email or mobile and password

200.description: Login successful. Returns user and login token.
